title: Avaloq Development Business Analyst
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

We are a IT Services, IT Consulting, and Managed Services provider that helps companies improve their operational efficiency and decision-making capabilities utilizing technology.

With our passion, our people, and our genuine desire to achieve operational improvements, we want to see our clients accomplish their performance objectives.

As an solution development partner with years of experience, we bring expert knowledge to every one of our engagements.

Job Summary

Deegit Asia seeks a Techno-functional Avaloq Developer / Business Analyst with 5 to 7 years of experience to lead Avaloq Core Banking System development, customization, and integration projects, driving innovation and operational excellence in financial institutions.

Responsibilities

  • Develop and customize Avaloq Core Banking System modules, including Payments, Securities, Treasury, Risk, Lending, and Credit/MM, to meet business requirements and enhance system functionality
  • Design and implement Avaloq scripting (AQL), PL/SQL, and Oracle database solutions to optimize banking operations and reporting
  • Configure Avaloq parameters, develop reports, and establish business rules to support wealth management and private banking processes
  • Analyze business needs as a Business Analyst to translate requirements into technical specifications and system enhancements
  • Lead system integration and API development using RESTful APIs, Avaloq Adapter Framework (AAF), or middleware technologies to ensure seamless data flow and interoperability
  • Execute ETL, data migration, and data transformation tasks to maintain data integrity and support system upgrades
  • Apply DevOps practices by managing CI/CD pipelines, version control (Git, Bitbucket), and cloud-based deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP to accelerate delivery cycles
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams in Agile environments using Scrum methodologies to deliver high-quality solutions efficiently
  • Monitor and incorporate regulatory reporting, risk management, and compliance requirements (MAS, IFRS, Basel III) into system configurations and processes
  • Communicate effectively with stakeholders to manage expectations, resolve issues, and drive project success
  • Work independently and collaboratively to troubleshoot and resolve technical challenges proactively

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Avaloq Certified Professional (ACP) certification
  • Prior experience in financial institutions, fintech, or consulting firms
  • Programming skills in Java, Python, or other languages to support additional development tasks
  • Exposure to machine learning, AI, or automation tools applied in banking environments
  • Familiarity with cloud-native development and containerization technologies such as Docker, Kubernetes, and OpenShift
